# Elzo Brito

> Hub de projetos, consultoria e blog sobre IA aplicada, agentes autônomos e governança com evidência.

Site: https://elzobrito.github.io/
Author: Elzo Brito
Languages: pt-BR, en

## Primary pages

- Home (pt): https://elzobrito.github.io/
- Home (en): https://elzobrito.github.io/en/
- Blog (pt): https://elzobrito.github.io/blog/
- Blog (en): https://elzobrito.github.io/en/blog/
- ESAA (pt): https://elzobrito.github.io/esaa/
- ESAA (en): https://elzobrito.github.io/en/esaa/
- Consulting (pt): https://elzobrito.github.io/consultoria/
- Consulting (en): https://elzobrito.github.io/en/consulting/
- Articles / Scholar: https://elzobrito.github.io/artigos/

## Feeds

- RSS (pt): https://elzobrito.github.io/blog/rss.xml
- RSS (en): https://elzobrito.github.io/en/blog/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://elzobrito.github.io/sitemap-index.xml

## Focus topics

- ESAA — Event Sourcing for Autonomous Agents
- Agent governance, review loops and evidence
- Applied AI, security and operational control
- Practical tooling (local LLMs, prompts, workflows)

## Source repos

- https://github.com/elzobrito/ESAA-Core
- https://github.com/elzobrito/elzobrito.github.io
